summary: Iteration 20 - Admin Event Registrations Page Overhaul testing complete. All backend APIs (11/11 tests passed) and frontend UI functionality verified. The overhauled EventRegistrations.jsx page correctly displays all V2 registration fields including address, college/university, documents, hotel details, additional persons, add-ons, and fee breakdowns. Filters (search, category, payment, accommodation, room status) work correctly. Detail modal shows all sections dynamically based on registration type. Edit and Manual Registration modals contain all V2 fields. Export buttons (Excel, PDF, Accommodation Report) are functional.
critical_code_review_comments: EventRegistrations.jsx (Line 6-7): API and BACKEND URLs correctly pulled from environment variables
EventRegistrations.jsx (Lines 9-24): Category, Accommodation, and Payment maps properly defined with labels, colors, and icons
EventRegistrations.jsx (Lines 81-93): Filtering logic correctly handles search (name, email, phone, member_id), payment status, category, accommodation choice, and room assignment
EventRegistrations.jsx (Lines 95-107): Stats calculation correctly computes totals by category, payment status, revenue, and accommodation needs
EventRegistrations.jsx (Lines 231-249): Stats cards grid with proper responsive layout and color-coded categories

EventRegistrations.jsx (Lines 348-477): Detail modal with all V2 sections: Personal Info, Address, College/University, Documents, Accommodation, Additional Persons, Add-ons, Membership, Fee Breakdown, Assigned Accommodation
EventRegistrations.jsx (Lines 507-563): Edit modal with all V2 fields including address, college, fees, payment status/mode
EventRegistrations.jsx (Lines 566-658): Manual registration modal with member search, all V2 fields, fee inputs, and total calculation
EventRegistrations.jsx (Lines 140-156): openEditModal correctly pre-fills all fields including V2 address and fee fields
Backend server.py (Lines 1463-1546): Excel export with 40 columns covering all V2 fields
Backend server.py (Lines 1667-1731): PDF export with 12 key columns including registration_category
Backend server.py (Lines 1620-1664): Manual registration endpoint accepts all V2 fields
Backend server.py (Lines 1580-1608): Edit registration endpoint handles V2 fields with proper type conversion
seed_data_creation: Test registrations created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Event Registrations page fully functional. Stats cards show Total (18), Paid (2), Pending (16), Revenue (₹5,300), Members (0), Non-Members (7), Students (3), International (8), Need Accom (14), Room Assigned (1). All filters work: search by name/email/phone/member_id, filter by category (member/non_member/student/international), payment status (paid/pending/verification_pending), accommodation (default/premium_hotel/self/none), room status (assigned/unassigned). Detail modal shows all V2 sections including Uploaded Documents with PDF links. Edit modal allows updating all V2 fields. Manual registration modal includes member search and all V2 fields. Export endpoints return correct file types (xlsx, pdf).

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/events/{eventId}/registra: PASS - Returns 18 registrations with V2 fields
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/events/{eventId}/registe: PASS - Creates registration with V2 fields

frontend_ui.page_load: PASS - Event title, date, venue, stats cards visible
frontend_ui.stats_cards: PASS - 10 stats cards showing totals by category, payment, accommodation
frontend_ui.search_filter: PASS - Filters by name, email, phone, member ID
frontend_ui.detail_modal: PASS - Shows all V2 sections: Personal Info, Address, College/University, Documents, Accommodation, Additional Persons, Add-ons, Fee Breakdown
frontend_ui.documents_section: PASS - Shows Identity Proof and Bonafide Certificate with View PDF links
frontend_ui.edit_modal: PASS - Contains all V2 fields with proper inputs and dropdowns
frontend_ui.manual_registration_modal: PASS - Contains member search, all V2 fields, fee inputs
frontend_ui.export_buttons: PASS - Excel, PDF, Accom Report buttons visible and functional

ui_verification.category_badges: VERIFIED - Member (green), Non-Member (orange), Student (purple), International (blue) with icons
ui_verification.accommodation_display: VERIFIED - Shows choice and hotel details with room type
detail_modal_sections: Personal Information (name, email, phone, qualification, organization, member ID)
Address (address_line1, address_line2, district, state, country, pincode)
Uploaded Documents (identity_proof_url, bonafide_cert_url) - with View PDF links
Additional Persons (list with name, age, mobile)
Fee Breakdown (registration_fee, accommodation_fee, additional_persons_fee, addon_fee, membership_fee, total)
Assigned Accommodation (room_no, location, location_type, map_link, notified) - when assigned
